site.title: Dr. Abdussalam Omar — Portfolio
site.description: Leading coach for business & life success. Empowering individuals and organizations to achieve their highest potential through proven coaching methodologies and transformational programs.

profile.name: Dr. Abdussalam Omar
profile.title: Celebrated Global Leadership Coach
profile.tagline: Leading coach for business & life success
profile.headline: Empowering individuals and organizations to achieve their highest potential through proven coaching methodologies and transformational programs.
profile.bio: Meet Dr. Abdussalam Omar, the visionary founder of Deep Immersion, recognized as one of the top 10 NLP consultants in CEO Insights 2020. With over a decade of expertise as a Leadership Coach and Counselor, he holds accreditation from the American Board of NLP and is an ICF-accredited coach. Renowned for transforming lives and businesses, he integrates innovative coaching, spiritual healing, and NLP techniques to guide individuals and organizations toward purposeful living. Beyond coaching, Dr. Omar contributes to academia as a faculty member at King Saud University. His commitment to societal impact is evident in chairing the Ruqayya Foundation, dedicated to protecting orphans and widows. Experience profound change under his guidance at Deep Immersion.
credentials: Accredited by the American Board of NLP

social_impact.mission: Dedicated to protecting orphans and widows

deep_immersion.name: Deep Immersion

deep_immersion.award_source: CEOInsights — India's leading business magazine with 1.4M+ subscribers

hea.name: Dr. Omar's Human Excellence Academy
hea.description: The most sought-after, innovative, ethical, and result-oriented coaching, counselling, and training & development provider in the Middle East since 2010, expanded to India since 2019.

bcc.name: Business Coaching Club
bcc.description: An annual mentorship and business networking ecosystem designed to help entrepreneurs structure scalable growth, build sustainable brands, and protect their long-term legacy. The program integrates business strategy with leadership intelligence and personal life balance.

core_pillars.description: Operating with integrity, transparency, and fairness.
Creating businesses that solve real problems and serve beyond profit.
Designing systems, culture, and governance that endure across generations.
Finding harmony between family, business, society, and spirituality.
Fostering a trusted circle of collaborative entrepreneurs.
Maintaining a growth mindset to adapt to a fast-changing world.

member_benefits.description: Ongoing accountability and clarity throughout the year.
Ready-to-use SOPs, dashboards, checklists, and frameworks.
Access to exclusive in-person gatherings, strategic collaborations, and global networks.
Guidance on structuring companies for IPO and Private Equity (PE) funding readiness.

oathmen.name: OATHMEN
oathmen.subtitle: A 1-Year Practical Entrepreneurship Fellowship for Young Founders
oathmen.description: OATHMEN is a startup coaching club that helps young entrepreneurs turn their ideas into real businesses. It's a practical program that teaches founders how to build ethical, organized, and scalable companies that are ready for investment. The goal is to support entrepreneurs in creating successful ventures that make a positive impact.
oathmen.value_proposition: By joining OATHMEN, founders can gain the skills and knowledge they need to take their idea to the next level and create investment-ready enterprises.

key_features.description: Build real products, get real feedback, and achieve real results through hands-on startup experience.
Learn from experienced founders and industry experts who have built successful ventures.
Build in public, ship weekly, and maintain momentum with structured accountability.
Prepare your venture for funding with polished pitch decks and investor connections.

programs.summary: Teen Immersion offers a transformative experience for teenagers aged 14 to 19, providing a platform for self-discovery and growth. Through a blend of adventure, creativity, and mindfulness practices, participants explore their potential, develop resilience, and clarify their life vision.
